theorems.statement: вҲҖ (f : в„қ вҶ’ в„қ), (вҲҖ (x y : в„қ), f (x - f y) = 1 - x - y) вҶ” вҲҖ (x : в„қ), f x = 1 / 2 - x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_82634

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_82802

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_82846

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_82878

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_8357

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_8572

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_8588

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_869

theorems.statement: вҲҖ (a : в„қ) (b : в„қ) (c : в„қ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c), (a + b) * (a + c) + (b + c) * (b + a) + (c + a) * (c + b) вүҘ 6 * вҲҡ(a * b * c * (a + b + c))

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_9007

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_9020

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_9493
